name: GroundShot: Visually Consistent Multi-Shot Long Video Generation via Entity-Grounded Shot Scheduling
summary: arXiv:2606.20799v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Generating visually consistent multi-shot videos remains an open challenge. As videos span more shots, inconsistencies can accumulate acros...
description: arXiv:2606.20799v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Generating visually consistent multi-shot videos remains an open challenge. As videos span more shots, inconsistencies can accumulate across shots, causing entities that reappear across shots -- characters, objects, and locations -- to drift away from how they first appear. We observe that viewers judge consistency by comparing each late...
author: Yixuan Lai, Tianjia Shao, Kun Zhou, Weijia Dou, Siyu Zhu, Jingdong Wang
